metadata.description: Deploy the Surface Preparation Unit (LSPU) for sintering depleted regolith into foundation material for landing pads and tank farms.
metadata.intended_usage: Reference in Phase 1 after rover deployment, before site prep foundation finalization.
metadata.author: AI Copilot

task.name: Deploy Surface Preparation Unit (LSPU)
task.description: Transport and deploy the LSPU mobile sintering unit to the landing site. The LSPU processes depleted regolith from the TEU/PVE pipeline using microwave sintering to produce compacted foundation material for infrastructure.
